| 5 | Artificial intelligence–based dependent task offloading in next-generation edge networks | 探讨基于AI的下一代边缘网络任务卸载方案，涉及IoT与5G/6G延迟需求 | https://openalex.org/W7162230146 | 边缘计算,任务卸载,AI,5G/6G | 2026-04-30 | École de technologie supérieure | 0 |
